docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL, RACHEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED JUN-19-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL, RACHEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JULY 30, 2018. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY.AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JULY 30, 2018. BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINE, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARROLL, RACHEL $3,585.70 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,735.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY FINE, DANIEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,595.70 FILED BY FINE, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL, RACHEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FINE, DANIEL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $72.87 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL, RACHEL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 10/10/2018 - WRIT EXPIRED. AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL, RACHEL
